prestazioni: Unitek Performance 'Dual Motor Inverter Overclock' (PMSRM + ACRM) firmware reflash targeting 550 kW (738 hp) peak output with custom liquid cooling loop using a PWR North America 'Performance Radiator' and dual Bosch 0280750986 high-flow coolant pumps for sustained track use

Tesla-specific 'Ludicrous+' mode hardware upgrade via EV West 'Model Y Performance Battery Module Expansion' (adding 2x 21700 cell modules, 98 kWh total capacity) paired with a Weistec Engineering 'High-Current Busbar Kit' (1,200A rated) to eliminate voltage sag under extreme acceleration

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Quaife ATB LSD (part #QKE40Y) for the rear motor (ACRM) and a custom 3D-printed titanium front motor mount (designed by Unplugged Performance) to reduce flex under 0-60 mph launches (verified 2.8s 0-60 mph with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires)
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS 'Model Y Performance Widebody Kit' (Type 2, carbon fiber) with integrated Vorsteiner V-FF 105 forged wheels (20x10.5 +35 front, 20x12 +40 rear) and custom fender flares to clear 285/30R20 and 315/25R20 tires

Rocket Bunny 'Pandem Aero Suite' (Model Y-specific) including a 3-piece carbon fiber rear wing (1,200mm span, adjustable angle via KW Automotive 'Wing Risers'), front splitter with canards, and side skirts with integrated LED turn signals (Lux H8 V4 bulbs)

100% bespoke interior by 1010 TUNING featuring full Alcantara headliner (Stingray Blue), custom Recaro SPG XL seats (heated/ventilated, with Tesla Autopilot integration via OpenPilot hardware), and a MOMO 'Mod.78' steering wheel with integrated Tesla 'Track Mode' quick-toggle button
